articles.title: Iris Dena: Torpedoed Iranian warship was offered sanctuary in India - BBC
articles.description: India says Tehran sought permission to dock three ships on the day the US and Israel began a war on Iran.
articles.content: The sinking of the Iris Dena, with 130 sailors on board, in international waters off Sri Lanka's southern coast on 4 March marked a dramatic widening of the war - and raised questions about India's a… [+24 chars]
